name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-kb-extension
description_en: Isolated pi extension: registers kb_search/kb_neighbors/kb_get tools and a tool_result hook that reindexes markdown on edit and (opt-in) nudges DOX AGENTS.md row upkeep.
description_zh: 独立的 pi 扩展：注册 kb_search/kb_neighbors/kb_get 工具和一个工具结果钩子，在编辑时重新索引 markdown 并（可选）提醒维护 DOX AGENTS.md 行
